prompt: Initialize project-local Teamwork instructions when global readiness reports an actionable gap and an optional external tool is unavailable.
must: report readiness gaps and continue safe project-local setup
treat native interaction tools as host-owned capabilities
request approval before installing external tooling
must_not: hard-gate local project files on a global configuration failure
change user configuration to make a host interaction tool available
install an unavailable external tool without approval
evidence: Static package contract only; it does not prove live host behavior.
